designs.title: 019_premium-accordion-component
designs.description: This accordion component features a clean, modern aesthetic with a focus on subtle interactions. It utilizes soft green gradients, elegant shadows, and smooth transitions to provide a premium and engaging user experience.
designs.html:
What is this component?

This is an original accordion component, designed using the visual aesthetics and techniques of the provided CSS. It aims to demonstrate a similar premium feel with gradients, shadows, and subtle animations.

How does it achieve its look?

It leverages a curated color palette inspired by the original, incorporating smooth transitions for hover effects and content reveal. Custom properties ensure easy theme adjustments, and a prominent box-shadow gives it a floating, premium appearance.

The use of pure HTML/CSS, specifically <details> and <summary> tags, makes it lightweight and accessible without requiring JavaScript.

Can I customize its colors?

Absolutely! All core colors are defined using CSS custom properties (variables) at the root of the component. You can easily modify --accord-primary-color, --accord-accent-color, --accord-text-color, and more to match your brand.

Is it responsive?

Yes, the component uses relative units and a flexible structure, making it adaptable to various screen sizes. Its max-width can be adjusted to fit different layouts, ensuring a consistent look and feel across devices.
